Video.summary: The guys install some drivetrain upgrades on their CTS-V, and paint some custom stripes on the 72 Chevelle.
Video.title: Caddy Drivetrain and Chevelle Stripes

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys take their souped-up Cadillac CTS-V for a spin.
Video.title: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Image.alt: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton get cracking on a true piece of 90s muscle, their 1990 Mustang.
Video.title: Stumbling Out the Gate

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton get to work on their 1990 Mustang installing a new front and rear suspension.
Video.title: A Pair of New Horseshoes

Video.summary: It's time to triple the horsepower in our 1990 Mustang! Project Fast Lane Fox Body is getting a new heart.
Video.title: This Horse Has Horsepower

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton's 1990 Mustang is about to undergo a major transformation with a new widebody kit.
Video.title: A Bit of Plastic Surgery

Video.summary: It's all about the looks as Tommy and Peyton start on the interior changes to their 1990 Fox Body Mustang.
Video.title: Saddled Up

Video.summary: It's a blast from the past when project Fast Lane finally sings.
Video.title: The Ice Horse

Video.summary: We dust off our Test Sled from the pits of darkness and give it a new life.
Video.title: Test Sled Reincarnated Stage 1

Video.summary: Our Test Sled has been rejuvenated with a new engine & transmission.
Video.title: Test Sled Reincarnated Stage 2

Video.summary: Can our budget build rival a new Lexus?
Video.title: The Perfect Project Car?

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy plug a monster bowtie powerplant into the newly painted Chevelle Project.
Video.title: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Image.alt: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Video.summary: Is custom exhaust worth it on a budget build?
Video.title: Tune & Tone

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: We clean up our 1972 C-10 front end with relocated hood hinges and a custom bed frame.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 6: Bed Redefined

Video.summary: We install the engine and trans, make brake lines, then fab a clean, simple exhaust on our 1972 C-10.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Video.summary: Brian and Jason unbox a budget 2011 Lexus IS 250 body kit from China. Will it fit or need cutting?
Video.title: Body Kit Bolt Ons

Video.summary: We reveal plans to transform a '61 Chevy Impala into "Red Sled." Then an appraisal on the finished LeMans.
Video.title: Project Red Sled Debut

Video.summary: '61 Impala frame enforcement, Air Ride suspension system installation, and driving Year One's '67 Mustang.
Video.title: '61 Impala - Red Sled Frame Work

Video.summary: We powder coat a 61 Impala's frame and explore the allure of a 67 Corvette Stingray.
Video.title: '61 Impala - Red Sled Bodywork

Video.summary: We continue on a 1969 Firebird, taking off the rusty sub-frame and modifying the Impala, known as 'Red Sled'.
Video.title: Red Sled Sheet Metal

Video.summary: We tackle rust and lead filler removal on the 1961 Impala, restoring its trunk and body panels.
Video.title: Red Sled Gets the Lead Out

Image.alt: Red Sled Gets the Lead Out
Red Sled Gets the Lead Out
Red Sled Gets the Lead Out

Video.summary: We revamp a classic Impala with a 409 engine and hit the Year One Experience for muscle car fun.
Video.title: Red Sled gets a 409

Video.summary: Rick and Tommy finish Red Sled's steering, clutch and Air Ride systems. Learn how to rebuild a starter.
Video.title: Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride

Image.alt: Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride
Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride
Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride

Video.summary: Red Sled is finished. Look back at the entire build, and ride along on her maiden voyage.
Video.title: Red Sled Hits the Road

Video.summary: The guys begin a tribute build to one of the most legendary muscle cars ever made: a 1969 ZL1 COPO Camaro.
Video.title: NOPO to COPO

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie machine a beastly Small Block Ford for serious pump-gas track power.
Video.title: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1

Image.alt: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1
Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1
Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1

Video.summary: We transform our classic C-10 with bodywork and a flawless pearl two-tone finish.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 8: Pearlfection

Video.summary: Brian and Jason have 48 hours to finish Project Budget Baller's audio and wheel upgrades.
Video.title: Final 48 Hour Fixes

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy get to work restoring the engine bay and front suspension.
Video.title: Cobra Cleanup

Video.summary: Our Mustang Cobra Project Sydewinder gets its aggressive exhaust system.
Video.title: Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang

Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang
Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang

Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody

Video.summary: To keep Project Sydewinder on the ground we need a little help.
Video.title: Installing a Mustang Foxbody Wing

Video.summary: Project Sydewinder get some custom paint and graphics plus demystifying older car terms and labels.

In House Power Mouse: Stage II

Video.summary: Pat and Mike button up their Gen III Hemi with super trick heads, then it's tech tip time with Mike and Pat.
Video.title: Hemi Top End Magic

Video.summary: In Stage 3 of our small-block build, our 383 becomes a 406.
Video.title: In-House Power Mouse Roars

Video.summary: Joel & Brian mod a 6.2L supercharged '15 Camaro ZL1: faster for less cash?
Video.title: Go Fast, Spend Less

Video.summary: Upgrading our 2015 Camaro ZL1 with new brakes, coilovers, and tires for better performance.
Video.title: ZL1 Performance Upgrades You Can Feel

ZL1 Performance Upgrades You Can Feel

Video.summary: The guys drag a classic Chevy out of a hay barn.
Video.title: Barn Find Bow Tie

Video.summary: 'The guys install a plethora of new body panels on their barn-find Chevelle.
Video.title: Sheetmetal Makeover

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew Upgrades the suspension on a classic Chevelle for corner carving and high end handling
Video.title: Chevelle - New Legs

Video.summary: How to fit panels on a classic Chevelle, as well as repairing cracked or broken fiberglass
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits

Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits

Video.summary: A frame-off Chevelle Barn find restoration continues with a dazzling metallic baby blue paint job.
Video.title: 72 Chevelle: Baby Blue

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys install a brand new interior in their ’72 Chevelle project.
Video.title: Chevelle Inside Out

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy work on getting the 1972 Chevelle Supercharger Innercooler plumbed.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber

Image.alt: Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber
Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber

Video.summary: The 1972 Chevelle barn find project needs a fuel system to support the 1000 horsepower engine.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust

Image.alt: Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust
Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust
Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy finish up the barn find Chevelle build and take it to a famous road in the Smoky Mountains.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle Payoff
